meta.question: What timing requirements are formalized for the APS?
meta.finalAnswer:
No formal timing requirements found for APS in the TMT model. 

After extensive exploration of the SysML model:
- Found 18 APS-related requirements (tmt%20requirement type), but these are primarily interface requirements (ICDs), maintainability, and metric standardization - not timing-specific
- The model does contain timing constraints (time constraints, duration constraints) with values like 0s, 1s, 2s, 10s, 60s, but these are general system timings not specifically tied to APS
- The "APS Performance Requirements" view exists but appears to contain performance specifications (measurement errors, etc.) rather than timing requirements

The timing requirements for APS may be stored in external requirements management tools (DOORS) rather than in this Cameo Systems Modeler export.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: Found APS-related elements including "APS Performance Requirements" view. Need to explore properties of this element to find timing requirements.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS Performance Requirements"))) 
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?type), "requirement"))
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: Found 18 APS-related requirements. Need to find timing-related ones specifically. Let me search for requirements with timing-related terms in their names.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?type), "requirement"))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("time")) || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("latency")) || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("cycle")) || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("response")) || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("duration")) || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("period")))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("performance")) || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("timing")) || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("requirement")))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS Performance"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?req ?name WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/tmt%20requirement> .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS"))) 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("performance")) || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("timing")) || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("response")) || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("latency")))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?type), "tmt%20requirement"))
}
LIMIT 100

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/tmt%20requirement> .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS"))) 
  ?req ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?child ?name WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/tmt%20requirement> .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS"))) 
  ?req vocab:Element_ownedElement+ ?child .
  ?child vocab:NamedElement_name ?childName .
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?act ?name ?node ?nodeName ?nodeType WHERE {
  ?act rdf:type <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/activity> .
  ?act vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS Mission")))
  ?act <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/Activity_node> ?node .
  ?node rdf:type ?nodeType .
  OPTIONAL { ?node vocab:NamedElement_name ?nodeName }
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?act ?name ?node ?nodeName WHERE {
  ?act rdf:type <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/activity> .
  ?act vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS Mission")))
  ?act ?prop ?node .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?prop), "node"))
  OPTIONAL { ?node vocab:NamedElement_name ?nodeName }
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?interval ?minLit ?value WHERE {
  ?interval rdf:type <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/time%20interval> .
  ?interval <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/TimeInterval_min__from_TimeInterval> ?minExpr .
  ?minExpr <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/TimeExpression_expr> ?duration .
  ?duration <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/Duration_expr> ?minLit .
  ?minLit rdf:type <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/literal%20string> .
  ?minLit <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/LiteralString_value> ?value .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?value), "s") && !CONTAINS(STR(?value), "https"))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?duration ?expr ?lit ?value WHERE {
  ?duration rdf:type <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/duration> .
  ?duration <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/Duration_expr> ?expr .
  ?expr rdf:type <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/literal%20string> .
  ?expr <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/LiteralString_value> ?value .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(?value, "s") && !CONTAINS(?value, "http"))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?type), "view") || CONTAINS(STR(?type), "package"))
}
LIMIT 50

PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?view ?name ?elem ?elemName ?elemType WHERE {
  ?view vocab:NamedElement_name "APS Performance Requirements" .

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?view ?name ?val ?valName ?valType WHERE {
  ?view rdf:type <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/view> .
  ?view <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/NamedElement_name> "APS Requirements Flow-Down Process" .
  ?view <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/Element__elementValueOfElement> ?val .
  ?val rdf:type ?valType .
  OPTIONAL { ?val <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/NamedElement_name> ?valName }
}
LIMIT 50

request.reason: After extensive exploration, found that while the model contains timing constraints (time constraints, duration constraints) and duration values (0s, 1s, 2s, 10s, 60s), there are no formal timing requirements specifically linked to APS elements. The 18 APS-related requirements found are interface requirements, maintainability, and other non-timing requirements. The timing values in the model appear to be general system timing and not APS-specific.

request.answer:
No formal timing requirements found for APS in the TMT model. 

After extensive exploration of the SysML model:
- Found 18 APS-related requirements (tmt%20requirement type), but these are primarily interface requirements (ICDs), maintainability, and metric standardization - not timing-specific
- The model does contain timing constraints (time constraints, duration constraints) with values like 0s, 1s, 2s, 10s, 60s, but these are general system timings not specifically tied to APS
- The "APS Performance Requirements" view exists but appears to contain performance specifications (measurement errors, etc.) rather than timing requirements

The timing requirements for APS may be stored in external requirements management tools (DOORS) rather than in this Cameo Systems Modeler export.

events.finalAnswer:
No formal timing requirements found for APS in the TMT model. 

After extensive exploration of the SysML model:
- Found 18 APS-related requirements (tmt%20requirement type), but these are primarily interface requirements (ICDs), maintainability, and metric standardization - not timing-specific
- The model does contain timing constraints (time constraints, duration constraints) with values like 0s, 1s, 2s, 10s, 60s, but these are general system timings not specifically tied to APS
- The "APS Performance Requirements" view exists but appears to contain performance specifications (measurement errors, etc.) rather than timing requirements

The timing requirements for APS may be stored in external requirements management tools (DOORS) rather than in this Cameo Systems Modeler export.
